patches.summary: Added hand-coded Booking.com price, watch, trip, deal, search, and review analysis commands promised by the generated docs.
patches.reason: The generated CLI advertised these transcendence workflows in help and README, but only the absorbed endpoint commands were wired.

patches.summary: Allowed the generated Chrome cookie LIKE pattern while preserving the sqlite3 host_key validation gate.
patches.reason: Chrome profile auto-detection builds %booking.com% before counting cookies; rejecting a leading wildcard made pycookiecheat and cookie-scoop profiles look empty.

patches.summary: Required trip-plan combinations to use one currency and capped the DFS search space.
patches.reason: Budget comparisons are only meaningful across same-currency prices, and large leg counts can otherwise trigger an unbounded combinatorial search.

patches.summary: Computed compare distance output from hotel coordinates instead of emitting a permanently zero delta.
patches.reason: Booking hotel detail pages provide latitude and longitude, but no search-center distance value; using the coordinates makes the comparison distance field meaningful.

patches.summary: Skipped trip legs with no parseable prices after warning instead of adding empty DFS option buckets.
patches.reason: A successful HTTP response with no parseable prices should not silently make the whole trip plan appear impossible.

patches.summary: Returned a diagnostic when trip legs have no common price currency.
patches.reason: The planner cannot compare budgets across currencies; returning an empty successful result made multi-country currency mismatches look like no availability.

patches.summary: Included custom request headers in the Booking.com HTTP cache key.
patches.reason: The mobile-rates deal comparison fetches the same search URL with desktop and mobile user agents; sharing one cache entry made the mobile response reuse desktop HTML.
patches.validated_outcome: go test ./internal/client -run TestCacheKeyIncludesHeaders and go test ./internal/cli succeeded.

patches.summary: Skipped trips with unknown cancellation deadlines when applying the deadlines window.
patches.reason: The deadlines command promises trips whose cancellation deadline is within --within; including unknown-deadline trips made the filtered output over-inclusive.
